text:
# `mxlpy.minimizers.abstract`

Types for minimizers.

## Classes

### class `AbstractMinimizer`

Abstract minimizer.

### class `MinimizerProtocol`

Protocol for minimizers.

### class `OptimisationState`

Result of a minimization operation.

### class `Residual`

Protocol for steady state residual functions.

This is the internal version, which is produced by partial
application of `settings` of `ResidualProtocol`

## Functions

### `mock_minimizer(residual_fn: Residual, p0: dict[str, float], bounds: Bounds | None) -> Result[OptimisationState]`

Mock minimizer for testing purposes.

Parameters
----------
residual_fn
    Residual function (unused)
p0
    Initial parameter values
bounds
    Parameter bounds (unused)

Returns
-------
Result[OptimisationState]
    Result containing the initial parameters with zero residual
